description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a light tan brick exterior and a gable roof. The front facade features large, symmetrical windows and a central entryway with a small set of steps leading up to the door. A paved driveway extends from the street to a garage on the left side, while a fenced yard surrounds the property. The right side of the house includes a raised deck with outdoor seating, accessible by stairs. The rear of the house is simpler, with fewer windows and a continuation of the white picket fence. The landscaping includes a green lawn and paved walkways, giving the house a welcoming and well-maintained appearance.
description: A two-story tan brick house with a gable roof, large front windows, a central entryway, and a fenced yard with a driveway and deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, central entryway with steps, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the raised deck with outdoor seating and the sloped driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, a simple facade, and the white picket fence enclosing the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, sloped walkway, and additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, a small porch, and a simple door flanked by large windows
